ogTitle: Theresa Creek vs Thinoomba: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Theresa Creek and Thinoomba.
heading: Theresa Creek vs Thinoomba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Theresa Creek, Queensland and Thinoomba, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Theresa Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Thinoomba (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Theresa Creek or Thinoomba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Thinoomba scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Thinoomba scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Theresa Creek or Thinoomba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Theresa Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
